latest.title: Lightning turns air into a shock wave
latest.script_key: lightning turns air into a shock wave watch the flash first because lightning heats a narrow path of air extremely fast that air expands suddenly and the pressure wave reaches us as thunder the sound is the atmosphere snapping back which storm signal next

latest.title: Cats groom to reset their scent map
latest.script_key: cats use grooming to reset their scent map watch the tongue and paw movements because grooming spreads familiar scent across the coat that can help a cat settle after a tense moment and keep the fur ready for the next move the cleanup is also a signal which pet behavior should we decode next

latest.title: Why cats choose boxes before open space that most people miss
latest.script_key: cats choose boxes because tight walls feel safer watch the first second the body pauses then the body position gives the clue in this clip the recovery angle is playful rolling on pebble most viewers watch the face but the useful signal is smaller that visible cue is the whole story so the short opens on the cat instead of stretching the setup that small detail gives the video a reason to exist

latest.title: mother duck's stealthy trick across the stream
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you watch her footwork every kick sends a tiny rippling trail upstream because she s testing depth and current keeps the ducklings tight behind that s why she moves slow and steady not fast and splashy did you ever think she was just walking them

latest.title: Chemical reactions aren't what your textbook showed
latest.script_key: watch the bubbles form right where the liquid meets the glass that s where gas is being made not where it starts textbooks show reactions as instant color changes but real gas forms first that s why it foams did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well
latest.script_key: dogs can follow a human point fast watch the eyes check the person because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures that skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated the small glance is social intelligence not random obedience what dog skill should come next

latest.title: Ducks carry waterproof oil on their feathers
latest.script_key: ducks keep water sliding off their feathers watch the feathers after the splash because ducks spread oil from a gland near the tail that coating helps water bead away keeping the body warmer and lighter the pond looks easy because the feather coat is engineered would you test it
